layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize entitlement review progress and expose the removal staging action.

layoutRegions.name: campaign-board
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect review campaigns, due dates, scoped entitlements, certification evidence, and removal state.

layoutRegions.name: reviewer-and-finding-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare reviewer queues, stale group membership, orphaned roles, owner intent, and exception windows.

layoutRegions.name: removal-plans
layoutRegions.purpose: Stage rollback-safe access removals with exception windows and reversible recovery paths.

components.name: CampaignCard
components.purpose: Shows one entitlement review campaign with scope, due date, evidence, and certified, review, or remove state.
interactions: state is visible through tokenized border color
card content stays stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: ReviewerQueueRow
components.purpose: Captures reviewer queue health, overdue items, owner signal, and access review state.
interactions: grid collapses without hiding queue status

components.name: AccessRemovalPlan
components.purpose: Captures removal action, exception window, and rollback-safe recovery path.
interactions: exception and rollback notes remain visible at narrow widths

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
